occasions: A dragon hatching
A shell cracking to reveal a creature of legend.
A wizard's duel
Two spellcasters clashing in a storm of magic.
A knighting ceremony
A warrior kneeling to receive sword and title.
A summoning ritual
A circle of power calling something from beyond.
A royal ball
A grand dance in a palace of glittering light.
A quest departure
Heroes setting out on a journey that will change them.
A prophecy reading
An oracle revealing what fate has in store.
A harvest festival
A celebration of the land's bounty with feast and dance.
A coronation
A crown placed upon a new ruler's head.
A pilgrimage
A devout journey to a place of sacred power.
A siege
An army encircling a fortress, waiting for it to fall.
A magical awakening
A dormant power stirring to life for the first time.
A fairy market
A hidden bazaar where the fae trade in secrets and dreams.
A sword forging
A blade being born in fire, hammer, and sweat.
A banishment
Someone cast out from home, never to return.
A peace summit
Former enemies meeting to end a long conflict.
A rite of passage
A young person proving they are ready for the world.
A monster hunt
Brave souls tracking a creature that terrorizes the land.
A potion brewing
A bubbling cauldron producing something powerful.
An enchantment breaking
A spell shattering, releasing what was held.
A wild magic storm
Chaotic magical energy warping everything it touches.
A ley line convergence
Lines of magical energy intersecting in a burst of power.
A mana drought
Magic failing and fading across the land.
A teleportation mishap
Someone appearing in the wrong place at the wrong time.
A memory fog
A mist that steals recent memories from those who enter.
A divine vision
A message from the gods delivered in blinding light.
A spirit procession
Ghostly figures marching along an ancient path.
A miracle healing
An impossible cure restoring someone beyond hope.
An angel sighting
A celestial being appearing to deliver judgment or mercy.
An aurora cascade
Magical lights streaming across the sky in waves.
A meteor shower
Burning stones streaking across the heavens.
A golem awakening
A construct of clay or stone stirring to life.
A familiar gathering
Magical animal companions assembling from far and wide.
A crystal singing
Enchanted crystals resonating with unearthly music.
An arcane tournament
Spellcasters competing to prove their magical prowess.
